name: WP-S13-pii-step-state: minors' PII out of remaining Inngest step returns + event payloads
description: Extend WI-578's landed pattern (WP-W3-pii-step-state, PR #933; pii-scrub.ts service) to the three sites it did not cover. Findings: F-028 (minor's full session transcript memoized in step return state — REMAINING LEGS after activation scan: auto-file-session 'fetch-transcript' step and topic-probe-extract 'load-transcript' step; the freeform-filing leg is ALREADY FIXED (transcript local to step closure, PII-egress comment) — replicate that closure pattern, do not re-fix it) · F-091 (inferred learner signals memoized in topic-probe-extract 'extract-signals' step return) · F-090 (user feedback free-text + support email carried in app/feedback.delivery_failed event payload — strip to IDs, rehydrate in the consumer). Read PR #933's diff for the sanctioned pattern BEFORE designing. Full finding text: docs/audit/2026-05-29-full-audit/L-gap-delta.md (label security-pii-inngest).
acceptanceCriteria: No session transcript or inferred-signal content serialized into Inngest step returns in auto-file-session / topic-probe-extract (transcripts local to step closures, DB-rehydrated); feedback.delivery_failed payload carries identifiers only; guard/regression test per finding (pii-scrub.guard.test.ts pattern); existing function behavior unchanged (tests green).
riskImpact: M / minors'-PII handling — mechanical but supervision: PII changes reviewed per charter.
bodyText:
Bundle brief — WP-S13-pii-step-state
Rationale
WI-578 (WP-W3-pii-step-state, PR #933) landed the sanctioned fix pattern for minors'-PII egress into Inngest's third-party state store, but its audited finding set (F-075/085–089) did not cover three sites surfaced by the same 2026-05-29 full audit under label security-pii-inngest. This WP extends the landed pattern to those remaining sites. PII of minors persisted in memoized step returns or event payloads is durable egress to a third-party store — P1 per the audit.
Strategy
Extend, never reinvent: reuse the WI-578 mechanisms — step-closure rehydration (fetch + format inside the consuming step via reference, e.g. sessionId), the pii-scrub.ts service, and the pii-scrub.guard.test.ts guard-test pattern. The executor MUST read PR #933's diff before designing. The freeform-filing leg of F-028 is ALREADY FIXED (transcript local to the retry-filing step closure, explicit PII-egress comment at freeform-filing.ts:170-172) — replicate that closure pattern, do not re-fix it.
Scope
In: the three findings below (4 child items; F-028 has two legs). Out: F-090/F-094/F-162/F-174's siblings in WI-666 (config-correctness), anything already fixed by PR #933, and the chronic Deploy-workflow staging failure (WI-664).
Findings table
Bundle Acceptance Criteria
No session-transcript or inferred-signal content serialized into any Inngest step return in auto-file-session / topic-probe-extract (content local to step closures, DB-rehydrated downstream).
app/feedback.delivery_failed payload carries identifiers only; the consumer rehydrates free-text + email from the DB.
Guard/regression test per finding following the pii-scrub.guard.test.ts pattern; break tests demonstrated red against pre-fix code.
Existing function behavior unchanged — full related test suites green; one PR for the WP.
Completion Summary — 2026-06-12
What was done: All four bundled findings remediated in PR #1030 (merged b7de23fd). F-028 leg 1 (auto-file-session): the fetch-transcript step return now carries an existence marker only; the transcript is rehydrated from the DB inside the file-session step closure (freeform-filing pattern). F-028 leg 2 + F-091 (topic-probe-extract): load-transcript, extract-signals, and persist-session-metadata merged into one idempotent extract-signals step closure returning only an opaque signal count; seed-retention-card kept as its own step (bare-number return, memoization-safe) and moved ahead of it. F-090 (feedback): the app/feedback.delivery_failed event now carries only an opaque retryId + scoping ids; the route parks the payload in the new first-party feedback_retry_queue table (failure path only, graceful enqueue-failure degradation), and the consumer rehydrates by retryId scoped by profileId, re-derives the support address from config, and deletes the row after a successful send. Absorbed children ride this WP: WI-638 (F-028 leg 1), WI-667 (F-028 leg 2), WI-668 (F-091), WI-669 (F-090).
What changed: apps/api/src/inngest/functions/auto-file-session.ts + topic-probe-extract.ts (step-state restructure, PII-egress comments, unused metadata/sessionType columns dropped from the load-session select); apps/api/src/routes/feedback.ts + apps/api/src/inngest/functions/feedback-delivery-failed.ts (reference-and-rehydrate via new services/feedback-retry.ts); packages/schemas/src/inngest-events.ts (feedbackDeliveryFailedEventSchema — route payload built with satisfies so reintroducing message/supportTo is a compile error); packages/database/src/schema/support.ts (feedback_retry_queue table, .enableRLS()); migration 0110_feedback_retry_queue.sql (CREATE TABLE + ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY + guarded profile-isolation policy; hand-crafted snapshot = 0109 + the new table only, deliberately not absorbing unrelated pending drift); webhook-idempotency-purge.ts (new purge-expired-feedback-retries step, 7-day floor); break tests + cutoff-pin tests across five test files; review fixes (profileId-scoped delete, de-duplicated step name).
Verification: Per-finding break tests demonstrated RED against pre-fix code, then GREEN: auto-file-session.test.ts "never memoizes transcript content in any step return" (RED with memoized "Learner: What is gravity?..."), topic-probe-extract.test.ts "never memoizes transcript content or extracted signals" (RED with raw exchange array + signals object), feedback.test.ts "[F-090] delivery_failed event carries an opaque retryId" (RED with message/supportTo/metaLines in the event). rls-coverage.test.ts 2/2 green after the RLS amendment. Local gates: tsc --build clean; api/schemas/database lint clean; pre-push full-delta 262 suites / 5650 tests green. CI on PR #1030 fully green at head ceff5b435 (only ota-update/run-smoke skipped, expected; ambient Deploy red is WI-664, pre-existing). Adversarial pre-PR review (1 round): SHIP, sole SHOULD-FIX (purge-cutoff coverage) fixed in-PR. Post-PR triage: Claude review SHOULD-FIX (delete scoping) + CONSIDER (duplicate step name) fixed in ceff5b435; two CodeRabbit index nitpicks rejected with rationale in-thread; re-run claude-review APPROVED.
Caveats / Follow-ups: (1) Accepted CONSIDER (dispositioned in-thread by shepherd): getFeedbackRetry uses a manual profile_id WHERE instead of createScopedRepository — mitigated by the explicit WHERE + RLS policy; this is a TEXT-profileId exception (column can hold the literal 'unknown'), do not copy the pattern to UUID-scoped tables. (2) Migration 0110 is merged but NOT yet applied to staging/production Neon — it must be applied before or with the next worker deploy; until then the feedback enqueue degrades gracefully (Sentry capture, queued:false) and the retry path is inert. (3) Unrelated unshipped schema drift observed on main (concepts/concept_mastery tables + identity-table constraint churn) that drizzle-kit generate would bundle into the next generated migration — the owning streams should capture and land it deliberately.
